title: chrysothamnus scopulorum
intro: Chrysothamnus scopulorum, also known as Bigelow sage or rabbitbrush, is a shrub native to the western United States and Canada. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antihistamine. Chrysothamnus scopulorum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
